ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated battery model */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of units available in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the battery stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which to reorder stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated battery model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the PDF documentation */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, manual, certificate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production run */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity of batteries produced in the run */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Status of quality checks for the production run */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the batteries were produced */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician, sales) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., manufacturing, quality assurance, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., battery specifications, inventory levels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., production, quality assurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)
